title: taraxacum dageletense
intro: Taraxacum dageletense, also known as the Dagestan dandelion, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, closely related to the common dandelion. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum dageletense include supporting liver function, reducing blood pressure, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum dageletense are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
